# Consent Playbook

## Inventory Basics

- List each cookie, storage key, SDK, tag, embed, or pixel.
- Record owner, purpose, third-party involvement, and activation point.
- Note whether it reads or writes identifiers.

## Classification Rules

- Separate strictly necessary functionality from analytics, personalization, and advertising.
- Use purpose-based categories users can understand.
- Escalate ambiguous cases for policy or legal review.

## UX Rules

- Make accept, reject, and manage-preferences paths all easy to reach.
- Block optional tags until effective consent exists.
- Let users revisit choices without hunting through the product.

## Operational Rules

- Version the consent configuration.
- Record timestamp and effective preference state.
- Review the inventory when new vendors, embeds, or experiments are added.
